message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve mediterranean food and should be in the cheap price range
The restaurant should be in the centre
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 4 people at 18:00 on wednesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on thursday and should go to stansted airport
The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 16:00
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
